properties.description:
Optional AI confidence indicator (Sprint 2 Task 23).
- high   → strong supporting signal across the dashboard data
- medium → directional signal, worth a manual check
- low    → weak signal, treat as a hint only

Brief reasoning text shown alongside the confidence badge.
Should stay within 280 characters; longer values are truncated by the panel.

stories.description: `outline` is kept for backward compatibility but produces identical styling to `secondary`. Migrate to `variant="secondary"`.

isBusy.description: Shows a spinner and disables the button. Sets `aria-busy="true"`.

busyLabel.description: When set, replaces children text while busy (spinner still shows).

asChild.description: When true, renders children directly via Radix Slot (for custom wrappers).

stories.description: Helper validation - exercised inside a story play function so it runs under the storybook vitest project without needing a separate test runner.

ui-confidencebadge.description: Sprint 2 Task 23 — Confidence Level Indicators Stories double as interaction tests under the storybook vitest project, verifying: - Color-coded foreground tokens (green / amber / slate) - Sentence case default labels - No pulsing animations - Numeric score → level mapping - 280-character reasoning truncation

label.description: When provided, replaces the default "X confidence" label.

hideIndicator.description: Hide the leading dot indicator. Defaults to false.

stories.name: Virtualized Queue
Empty
Row States
Bulk Actions
Large Dataset Virtualized
stories.description: Task 33: Virtual Scrolling Integrity. Renders a 1200-row dataset to validate that @tanstack/react-virtual only mounts a windowed subset of rows (rather than all 1200), keeps row heights consistent with the density token (40px default), and that the table owns a bounded, independent scroll container.

stories.name: With Label
With Helper Text
Valid State
Invalid State
stories.snippet:
const InvalidState = () => (
  <Field validationState="invalid">
    <Label>Required remarks</Label>
    <Textarea
      placeholder="Remarks are required for this operation."
      validationState="invalid"
    />
    <HelperText validationState="invalid">
      Remarks must be at least 10 characters.
    </HelperText>
  </Field>
);

stories.name: Default
stories.snippet:
const Default = () => <ShellHeader
    variant="default"
    eyebrow="Reports"
    title="Monthly production summary"
    description="Review output, exports, and operating signals for the selected range."
    actions={[
      { id: "export", label: "Export", variant: "outline" },
      { id: "print", label: "Print PDF" },
    ]} />;

stories.name: With metrics
stories.snippet:
const WithMetrics = () => <ShellHeader
    variant="default"
    eyebrow="Operations"
    title="Shift production overview"
    description="Complete overview of today's production across all active lines."
    actions={[{ id: "refresh", label: "Refresh", variant: "outline" }]}
    metrics={[
      { id: "units", label: "Units produced", value: "847", detail: "92% of target" },
      { id: "downtime", label: "Downtime", value: "23min", detail: "3 stops" },
      { id: "workers", label: "Active workers", value: "36", detail: "2 absent" },
    ]} />;

stories.name: With status badge
stories.snippet:
const WithStatusBadge = () => <ShellHeader
    variant="default"
    eyebrow="OCR Scanner"
    title="Document verification"
    tone="processing"
    toneLabel="In progress"
    metrics={[
      { id: "scanned", label: "Scanned", value: "142" },
      { id: "verified", label: "Verified", value: "98", detail: "69%" },
    ]} />;

)} />;

stories.name: With meta items
stories.snippet:
const WithMeta = () => <ShellHeader
    variant="default"
    eyebrow="Customers"
    title="Acme Steel Corp"
    meta={[
      { id: "code", label: "Code", value: "ACM-001" },
      { id: "balance", label: "Balance", value: "₹2,45,000" },
      { id: "credit", label: "Credit limit", value: "₹10,00,000" },
    ]} />;

stories.name: Dashboard
Live dashboard
stories.snippet:
const LiveDashboard = () => <ShellHeader
    variant="dashboard"
    title="Live attendance"
    liveIndicator
    liveLabel="Live tracking"
    description="Active shift tracking across all factory floors."
    metrics={[
      { id: "present", label: "Present", value: "142" },
      { id: "absent", label: "Absent", value: "8" },
      { id: "late", label: "Late", value: "3" },
    ]} />;

stories.name: Focus
stories.snippet:
const Focus = () => <ShellHeader
    variant="focus"
    title="Shift entry form"
    description="Capture shift production without hunting through screens." />;

stories.name: Focus with badge
stories.snippet:
const FocusWithBadge = () => <ShellHeader
    variant="focus"
    title="Stock reconciliation"
    tone="processing"
    toneLabel="Draft"
    description="Review physical counts and confirm variances." />;

variant.description: Layout variant. Affects spacing, density, and which slots are prominent.

eyebrow.description: Section label shown above the title (e.g. "Reports", "Operations").

liveIndicator.description: When true, shows a pulsing live indicator dot.

liveLabel.description: Label for the live indicator. Defaults to "Live".

header.description: Custom node injected into the eyebrow row (for PageShell compat).

elements.name: signature

meta.description: Key-value metadata items shown below the description.

elements.name: signature

rail.description: Optional control rail (e.g. toggle buttons, filters). Rendered alongside actions.

filters.description: Filter controls rendered below the metrics strip.

elements.name: signature

tsType.name: signature

properties.description: Total number of steps in the workflow.
Optional label describing the active step (e.g. "Verification").
Optional callback for navigating to the previous step.
Label for the back action. Defaults to "Back".
